title: Frontline & Mobile Execution Intelligence
note: Sprint numbering follows product roadmap sprints 16–25; AMP24 is Sustainability & ESG at /assistant/sustainability.
guardrails: Packets summarize tasks, evidence gaps, quick actions, and offline risks — completing WMS work, moving inventory, releasing shipments, or messaging partners stays in governed operational workflows.
Queue review writes audit events and AssistantActionQueueItem rows — it does not mutate tasks, exceptions, or supplier records automatically.

steps: Sign in with WMS, Control Tower, or supplier view access.
Open /assistant/frontline (also linked as Sprint 24 in the assistant subnav).
Click Create Sprint 24 packet and confirm AssistantFrontlinePacket persistence.
scenarios.passWhen: POST create_packet returns 201; GET snapshot lists the packet; WMS/shipment/supplier source rows unchanged.

steps: Optionally add a frontline approval note.
scenarios.passWhen: Packet status REVIEW_QUEUED; audit answerKind frontline_review; action queue references assistant_frontline_packet.

steps: Use tenant data with OPEN WMS tasks or shipment exceptions.
Reload preview or create a packet.
scenarios.passWhen: Dimensional JSON reflects queue, evidence checklist, quick actions, and offline risks; no silent execution.
